hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; MARKER=/tmp/claude-skill-modified-$(echo "$PWD" | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-8 || md5 -q -s "$PWD" | cut -c1-8); [[ $f == */.claude/commands/*.md || $f == */skills/*/SKILL.md ]] && { echo "$f" >> "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[skill-modified] Skill file change recorded. Will check for /qq-self-review before ending."}}'; } || true; }
